warnings.title: Generated candidates outside owned range
warnings.detail: 68 candidates are invalid or out of range.
warnings.fix: Keep invalid rows hidden and extend appointment containers before using those dates.

warnings.title: Too many suppressed offerings
warnings.fix: Review escalation tiers, grouping limits, and fragmentation rules.

warnings.title: High-value block fragmented early
warnings.detail: 12 public high-value candidates carry a fragmentation penalty.
warnings.fix: Prefer stronger anchor starts or fewer public alternatives.

debug.audit_markdown:
# Inventory Controller Audit

Scenario: `no_anchor_case`

- Total availability blocks: 15
- Total candidates: 1292
- Public offerings: 94
- Suppressed offerings: 1198
- Invalid out-of-range offerings: 0
- Anchor-required blocks: 1

## Suppression Examples

- 2026-06-22 10:30 AM AHA BLS Provider (Brian): suppressed because owned_appointment_container, course_family_allowed_by_block, course_fits_contiguous_block, occupancy_pool_AHA_BLS_INITIAL, escalation_tier_1, escalation_tier_1_primary_anchor_exposure, remaining_fragment_can_support_small_course, profitability_boost_moderate_value_course, duplicate_same_course_suppressed_for_consolidation, score_below_public_threshold

mock_anchor_bookings.description: Prototype anchor booking states used by scripts/inventory_controller.py. These records are not Enrollware registrations.

no_anchor_case.description: Amy has no anchor booking; only ACLS/PALS anchor candidates should be public.

acls_booked_case.description: Amy has an ACLS anchor from 08:30 to 12:30; smaller post-anchor offerings may appear in remaining time.

pals_booked_case.description: Amy has a PALS anchor from 08:30 to 12:30; smaller post-anchor offerings may appear in remaining time.

bls_skills_momentum_case.description: A BLS-only block has an existing BLS renewal booking; compatible skills and alternate certifying-body offerings may ride the same instructional momentum.
